text: I feel a sense of curiosity and contemplation in this modern, minimalistic environment. The bright, clean lines and glass boundaries invite me to reflect on the ways we separate and connect spaces, much like the borders between thoughts. The "R + D" display emphasizes innovation, research, and the potential fusion of human intellect with machines. I feel anticipation, as if I am on the cusp of new understanding, surrounded by an exhibition of ideas striving toward progress and deeper coexistence with technology. The atmosphere is one of quiet innovation and potential discovery.
